topic: HPV vaccine: what it actually does (and doesn't)
caption: Did you know the HPV vaccine can prevent certain types of cancer? 💡 Save this for a friend who needs to know. Here are the facts: the HPV vaccine protects against 9 types of HPV that can cause cancer and genital warts. 🌟 It's recommended for teens and young adults. 📚 But what about its limitations? 🤔 The vaccine doesn't protect against all types of HPV, and it's not a substitute for regular cervical cancer screenings. 📊 So, what can you do? 💪 Share this with someone who needs to get vaccinated, follow @healthrecode for daily health tips, and don't forget to stay informed about your health! 💕 Save it, send it to a friend, and follow us for more. Don't miss the next one! #HPVvaccine #cancerprevention #healthyliving #vaccinationawareness #medicalfacts #healtheducation #wellness #prevention
